toolSelection.reason: Mostly strong, but one trace still completed with zero grounded tool calls and several exact-target prompts only recovered after downstream retries.

scoutDepth.reason: Ten traces remained probe-light and produced only low-delta differentiation even when grounded data was available.

clarification.reason: This stage rarely activated; the high mean mostly reflects non-applicability rather than demonstrated ambiguity handling.

planning.reason: Exact-target resolution kept failing on named outcomes, entity-bound prompts, and date-bound prompts, and patch loops often refined phrasing without securing a deterministic target.

execution.reason: A stable retry-exhaustion pattern recurred across multiple answerable traces after wrong-target or missing-target detection.

synthesis.reason: Most answers were readable, but several traces still framed unresolved retrieval as a finished answer or summarized the wrong target too confidently.

contextBudget.reason: Generally efficient, with waste concentrated in a small number of wrong-target retry loops rather than broad budget collapse.

reasoningDepth.reason: Reasoning quality was usually adequate, but a few retries stayed shallow by rephrasing the same lookup instead of forcing exact target reconciliation.

mcpTransport.reason: One execution-context import restriction materially hurt a trace, but transport-style failures were not frequent enough to optimize in isolation yet.

codeSafety.reason: Validation and bounded repair usually kept failures non-destructive, though repeated weak-path patches still created avoidable risk.

synthesisBudget.reason: Budget was rarely the primary limiter; only the wrong-target traces showed meaningful budget waste.

interactionRisks.risk: When planning does not deterministically resolve the named target, execution spends retries on near-miss entities and the verifier eventually stops with an explicit gap rather than a recovered answer.
Probe-light discovery leaves synthesis with grounded but only moderately differentiated material, so answer quality plateaus even on successful traces.
A routing miss or execution-context restriction can surface as apparent data unavailability, masking whether the true failure was upstream selection or downstream runtime plumbing.
